name: the-hugging-bay
description: The Hugging Bay — a community index of torrents for openly-licensed AI models, weights, and datasets. Sailors unite.

scripts.build:mirrors: BAY_ORIGIN=https://thehuggingbay.io OUT_DIR=docs-root BASE_PATH= node build-static.mjs && BAY_ORIGIN=https://thehuggingbay.io node build-static.mjs
